title: generate_fresh_address returns Result<String,PaymentAction> — correct abstraction
description: generate_fresh_address returns Result<String, PaymentAction::Unknown{reason}> rather than Result<String, anyhow::Error>. This means callers get a typed wire-ready error they can forward directly to send_payment_message without any transformation or mapping. A future contributor might suggest returning anyhow::Result to unify error types. Resist: the caller only has one thing to do on error — forward PaymentAction::Unknown. Returning the typed error eliminates a transformation step and makes the error handling at the call site trivially correct.
